name: Project Soulflow
short_description: You're escaping a lab, you just have to hope you escape before they find you...
detailed_description:
Soulflow is an escapist horror game, escape the cursed laboratory under the watchful gaze of the VSP, finding out about their past as you progress through the facility. You are an experiment yourself, cursed to walk the boundary between our world and the soul world, flicking between them as you see fit. Of course, you don't just hide from the infernal creations of the VSP all the time, you can use old trapping technology to lock them in place temporarily, making your escape easier.

Take the role of a group of VSP engineers with your friends, fixing the containment units in the multiplayer mode, all the while being chased by the ever-growing hoards of monsters.
